info.name: رابطة سوق السيارات — Car Marketplace API
info.description:
Complete REST API collection for the Car Marketplace project — mobile app + admin dashboard.

Live server: https://api-rabta.rabtetsouqelsayarat.com

Set {{base_url}} to switch between local dev and the live server. {{mobile_token}} and {{admin_token}} auto-populate after Login/Admin Login thanks to test scripts — you do not need to copy tokens manually.

body.raw:
